question: A UA pilot is required to complete basic UA training:

options.text: Only for operating unmanned aircraft (UA) with a total mass greater than 7kg for recreational and educational purposes.
To operate an UA with a total mass exceeding 1.5 kg but not exceeding 7kg for recreational and educational purposes.
Before undertaking any UA operations training under the supervision of a licensed UA pilot.
Only for operating UA with a total mass greater than 25kg for business purposes.
